name: @scottmills306/apc-mcp
description: MCP server for audio plugin development — CMake build, test, lint, and project management for JUCE, CLAP, VST3, and ARA plugin projects

scripts.audit: npm audit && echo '✅ No known vulnerabilities'
scripts.security: npm audit --audit-level=high && echo '✅ Security gate passed'
scripts.check: npm run quality && npm run audit
scripts.ship: npm run check && git tag v$npm_package_version && git push origin main --tags
